name: plan011-runner-ts-migration
description: career-os의 모든 .sh runner를 TS(Bun)로 마이그레이션. 단일 진입점 career-os/bin/run-now(shebang TS) + lib/dispatcher.ts(14 case 라우팅) + 14 runner를 scripts/<skill>/<command>.ts로. _shared/bin/track_task.sh → _shared/bin/track_task.ts + cross-workspace caller(apartment 등) 일괄 갱신. 프롬프트는 skills/<skill>/references/*-prompt.md + {{placeholder}} 형식 유지. 관심사 분리: .sh=0개(또는 thin wrapper) / .ts=비즈니스 / .md=프롬프트(편집 가능) / config=데이터 / .env=비밀.

phases.title: career-os/bin/run-now + lib/dispatcher.ts 신설 (14 case 라우팅, .sh dispatcher와 공존)
가벼운 4 runner TS 마이그 (smoke / baseline / daily / recommend-positions)
중간 5 runner TS 마이그 (recommend-topics / replenish-topics / foodville-coffeechat / master / question-bank)
무거운 5 runner TS 마이그 (study-pack / maintain-study-pack / bootcamp-batch / live-coding-dispatch / auto-question-bank)
_shared/bin/track_task.ts 신설 + cross-workspace caller(career-os + apartment + stock-investment + travel) 일괄 갱신
통합 smoke + .sh 잔재 grep + .sh git rm + push + trailing cleanup
